texto: What is a diary as a rule? A document useful to the person who keeps it dull to the contemporary who reads it and invaluable to the student centuries afterwards who treasures it!
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Helen Terry que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “What is a diary as a rule? A document useful to the person who keeps it dull to the contemporary …”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, literature, diary, com foco em reflexao.
